purpose: Activate equation-building skill from M9. Confirm students can build a complete equation from an equal groups visual. Quick success with familiar skill.
visual: Equal Groups with Pictures: 5 bags with 2 items each. Equation Builder appears alongside with full equation template: `[___] × [___] = [___]`. Tile palette: `1 through 10`.
guide: "Let's warm up. You've been building equations — let's make sure you've still got it. Build the equation for this picture."
student_action: Equation Builder Methods C/D (tiles — M9 owned skill).
on_correct: "5 groups of 2. 5 times 2 equals 10. You know how to build equations."
remediation_note: Guide factor identification from visual: count bags (first factor), count items per bag (second factor). Then skip-count by 2s five times to find the product (10).
engagement_anchor: Quick Success (familiar M9 skill, high confidence entry)
design_note: Pure M9 callback. Uses bags (concrete, primes Lesson Section 1 which continues with bags). Values deliberately use ×2 family (easiest M9 fluency) for maximum accessibility. Full equation template `[___] × [___] = [___]` is the M9 format students know. The Equation Builder interface activation matters — Lesson 1.1 uses the same tool immediately.
